title: pilosella cymiflora subsp. tubulata
intro: Pilosella cymiflora subsp. tubulata, also known as the yellow salsify or yellow goat's beard, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Pilosella cymiflora subsp. tubulata can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in salves and creams for topical application.
